'''Tains''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Bulk cruiser/Legends|bulk cruiser]] [[Cerebus (bulk cruiser)|''Cerebus'']] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was part of the [[Corrupter Task Force]] that was assigned to locate the [[Defiance Task Force]].<ref name="Alliance" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
